samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: In saucepan in a minimum of, salted water,, cook noodles until tender
In same saucepan, melt butter or margarine, stir in flour
Stir in cheese, salt and pepper
Cook until hot and cheese is melted
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- elbow macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- sharp cheddar cheese
- salt
- black pepper
- bread crumbs

Instructions:
1. In saucepan in a minimum of, salted water,, cook noodles until tender
2. Drain and set aside
3. In same saucepan, melt butter or margarine, stir in flour
4. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly
5. Bring to a boil
6. Stir in cheese, salt and pepper
7. Add cooked and cooked noodles
8. Cook until hot and cheese is melted
9. Pour into greased casserole dish
10. Top with bread crumbs

samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- elbow macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- sharp cheddar cheese
- salt
- black pepper
- bread crumbs

Instructions:
1. Cook macaroni in directed on package
2. Drain
3. In a large saucepan, melt butter
4. Add in flour, stirring
5. Add in milk and. cheese
6. and cook till cheese heat
7. Add in salt pepper
8. Add in macaroni macaroni
9. Place in casserole
10. Top with bread crumbs and paprika
11. Bake at 350 for 30 min
12. Serves 6
